# Article 80 - Synthetic EU AI Act Article 80

Effective date: 2025-02-02
Jurisdiction: EU

Providers And Deployers are required to ensure a sufficient level of AI literacy for staff; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 15M.
Providers shall preserve evidence for Article 80 where necessary for competent authority review.
This fixture is deterministic and supports compliance pipeline evaluation.
